message:
feat: add engagement analytics to stats command (xf-11.2.2)

Implements comprehensive engagement analytics for the stats command:
- EngagementStats struct with histogram, top tweets, and trends
- SQL-based aggregations for likes/retweets distributions
- Top N tweets by total engagement with text preview
- Monthly engagement trend with sparkline visualization
- Likes histogram with percentage breakdown
- New --engagement flag for stats command
- Both JSON and text output formats supported

All quality gates pass: cargo check, clippy, fmt, and 135 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -174,6 +174,10 @@ pub struct StatsArgs {
     #[arg(long)]
     pub temporal: bool,
 
+    /// Show engagement analytics (likes distribution, top tweets)
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub engagement: bool,
+
     /// Number of top items to show
     #[arg(long, short = 'n', default_value = "10")]
     pub top: usize,
